# LTXV-2 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf**  
*Place in:* `unet`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/distilled/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf)

**LTXV-2.3-22b DISTILLED FP8**  
*Place in:* `diffusion_models`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_input_scaled_v3.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_input_scaled_v3.safetensors)

---

## Video VAE

*Place in:* `vae`

- [LTX-2.3-22b-distilled_video_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/vae/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_video_vae.safetensors)

---

blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap (“PNTR”), incorrect t-shirt slogan (“JUST DO IT”), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts.

[VISUAL]: A realistic video of a man delivering a calm and confident lecture in front of a plain white background. He maintains a steady posture with a neutral professional expression. His head remains almost completely still throughout the video, with only extremely subtle natural micro-movements and no noticeable turns, nods, or sudden motion. His body stays composed, and he performs a very slight and natural hand movement at one moment in the video, subtle and controlled, with no repeated gestures. The overall presentation resembles a teacher explaining a topic with very controlled, calm, and minimal motion.

[SPEECH]: The man speaks in German in a calm, natural, and professional tone: "Feedback ist also kein Machtinstrument, um zu zeigen, ich kann was oder ich weiß was und ich bin irgendwo besser als du, sondern es geht darum, Feedback gezielt als Führungs- oder Entwicklungsinstrument zu nutzen. "

[SOUNDS]: The speaker’s voice is clear, moderate, and conversational, as if speaking directly to the viewer in a studio recording.
